config.description: A friendly welcome page to demonstrate the simplest plugin possible.

sections.title: Hello, Oryn!
sections.description: Welcome to the Hello World plugin. If you can see this page, your plugin is working correctly. This is the simplest possible plugin — a single page with a hero section. From here, you can add stats, tables, charts, forms, and more.

config.label: Ping
config.description: A simple test action that returns pong. Use this to verify your plugin's action system works.

config.label: Hello World Stats
config.description: A simple widget showing this plugin is active.
